pi_items.source: Task description: 'Create a new Java class named BankAccount in package com.securebank.core within the BankSystem project'; setup_task.sh line 12: PROJECT_DIR="$WORKSPACE/BankSystem"

Task description specifies: 'Create a new Java class named BankAccount in package com.securebank.core'; export_result.sh line 13 confirms path: CLASS_FILE="$PROJECT_DIR/src/com/securebank/core/BankAccount.java"
Task description explicitly specifies Files template: '* Copyright (c) 2026 SecureBank Inc.'; verifier.py line 28 uses this exact string; current year is 2026 per system context
Task description explicitly specifies Files template to include: '* Confidential and Proprietary.'; verifier.py line 29 checks for this exact string
Task description explicitly specifies Types template: '* @author ${user}'; verifier.py line 30 uses '@author' as expected string; line 81 validates this tag in class content

Standard Eclipse JDT UI preferences location; setup_task.sh line 67 creates PREFS_DIR="$WORKSPACE/.metadata/.plugins/org.eclipse.core.runtime/.settings"; export_result.sh line 14 references the full prefs file path; setup_eclipse.sh line 16 confirms this standard Eclipse metadata structure

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Eclipse's Java code templates and creates a new Java class. All metadata claims are verified: (1) Project name is 'BankSystem', created at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/BankSystem; (2) Class path is 'src/com/securebank/core/BankAccount.java' relative to project root; (3) Files template copyright text is 'Copyright (c) 2026 SecureBank Inc.', matching the specified template; (4) Files template includes confidential notice 'Confidential and Proprietary'; (5) Types template includes '@author' tag with ${user} variable substitution; (6) Eclipse stores JDT UI preferences at the standard location '.metadata/.plugins/org.eclipse.core.runtime/.settings/org.eclipse.jdt.ui.prefs'. The data is synthetic, created for demonstration purposes during task execution.
